description: Each accomplished solo artists, Bill MacKay and Riley Walker have come together to make excellent instrumental duo recordings of interlocking guitars and warm give-and-take. “On [the song] “I Heard Them Singing,” from SpiderBeetleBee, the duo’s second album of guitar duets, their partnership results in contagious joy, audible in every note. When left alone, Walker crafts cosmic folk music that reverberates with a pensive haze; here, his playing is weightless and breezy. Atop Walker’s fingerpicking, MacKay plays a five-string requinto guitar with a nimble, romantic voicing.” (Pitchfork)
title: Ryley Walker & Bill MacKay Concert
